translations.en: We love pizza in the evening.
translations.es: Nos encanta la pizza por la noche.
translations.fr: Nous aimons la pizza le soir.
translations.it: Ci piace la pizza la sera.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们晚上很喜欢吃披萨。
translations.yue: 我哋夜晚好鍾意食薄餅。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi rất thích ăn pizza vào buổi tối.
translations.hi: हमें शाम को पिज़्ज़ा बहुत पसंद है.
translations.el: Μας αρέσει η πίτσα το βράδυ.
translations.id: Kami suka pizza pada malam hari.
translations.da: Vi kan godt lide pizza om aftenen.
translations.ja: 夜はピザが大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; syntactic subject of the finite verb.
Finite lexical main verb in present indicative; agrees with the subject (1st person plural).
Common noun, singular; direct object of the verb.
Contracted preposition ('an' + definite article 'dem'); introduces a dative temporal phrase.
Common noun; dative singular as complement of 'am'; temporal adjunct.

translations.es: A los niños les encantan los animales.
translations.vi: Trẻ em rất thích động vật.
translations.hu: A gyerekek nagyon szeretik az állatokat.
translations.hi: बच्चों को जानवर बहुत पसंद होते हैं.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά αγαπούν πολύ τα ζώα.
translations.ja: 子どもは動物が大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Plural common noun; syntactic subject of the verb.
Finite lexical main verb in present indicative; agrees with the subject (3rd person plural).
Plural common noun; direct object of the verb.
Degree adverb; intensifies the predicate ('lieben' → 'love very much').

sentences.target: Meine Eltern lieben Tee ohne Zucker.

translations.de: Meine Eltern lieben Tee ohne Zucker.
translations.en: My parents love tea without sugar.
translations.es: A mis padres les gusta el té sin azúcar.
translations.fr: Mes parents aiment le thé sans sucre.
translations.it: Ai miei genitori piace il tè senza zucchero.
translations.ko: 우리 부모님은 설탕 없는 차를 좋아하세요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我父母喜欢喝不加糖的茶。
translations.ru: Мои родители любят чай без сахара.
translations.pt: Meus pais gostam de chá sem açúcar.
translations.he: ההורים שלי אוהבים תה בלי סוכר.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ tôi thích trà không đường.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders houden van thee zonder suiker.
translations.uk: Мої батьки люблять чай без цукру.
translations.hu: A szüleim a cukor nélküli teát szeretik.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता को बिना चीनी वाली चाय पसंद है.
translations.pl: Moi rodzice lubią herbatę bez cukru.
translations.el: Στους γονείς μου αρέσει το τσάι χωρίς ζάχαρη.
translations.nb: Foreldrene mine liker te uten sukker.
translations.id: Orang tua saya suka teh tanpa gula.
translations.sv: Mina föräldrar gillar te utan socker.
translations.ro: Părinților mei le place ceaiul fără zahăr.
translations.cs: Moji rodiče mají rádi čaj bez cukru.
translations.da: Mine forældre kan godt lide te uden sukker.
translations.ja: 私の両親は砂糖なしのお茶が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; modifies 'Eltern' (plural) and marks possession by the speaker.
Plural-only common noun; syntactic subject of the verb.
Finite lexical main verb in present indicative; agrees with the subject (3rd person plural).
Common noun, singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition; takes an accusative complement and expresses absence.
Common noun; accusative complement of the preposition 'ohne'.

sentences.target: Sie lieben dieses Lied im Auto.

translations.de: Sie lieben dieses Lied im Auto.
translations.en: They love this song in the car.
translations.es: Les encanta esta canción en el coche.
translations.fr: Ils adorent cette chanson en voiture.
translations.it: A loro piace questa canzone in macchina.
translations.ko: 그들은 차에서 이 노래 듣는 걸 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在车里很喜欢听这首歌。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺車入面好鍾意呢首歌。
translations.ru: Им нравится эта песня в машине.
translations.pt: Eles adoram essa música no carro.
translations.he: הם אוהבים את השיר הזה באוטו.
translations.vi: Họ rất thích nghe bài hát này khi ở trên xe.
translations.ar: هم يحبون هذه الأغنية في السيارة.
translations.nl: Ze vinden dit liedje in de auto leuk.
translations.uk: Вони люблять цю пісню в машині.
translations.hu: Az autóban nagyon szeretik ezt a dalt.
translations.hi: उन्हें गाड़ी में यह गाना बहुत पसंद है.
translations.el: Τους αρέσει αυτό το τραγούδι στο αυτοκίνητο.
translations.nb: De liker denne sangen i bilen.
translations.id: Mereka suka lagu ini di mobil.
translations.sv: De gillar den här låten i bilen.
translations.ro: Le place melodia asta în mașină.
translations.cs: Mají rádi tuhle písničku v autě.
translations.da: De kan godt lide denne sang i bilen.
translations.ja: 彼らは車でこの曲を聴くのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; here functioning as the subject (3rd person plural or formal 'you').
Finite lexical main verb in present indicative; agrees with the subject.
Demonstrative determiner; neuter singular; modifies 'Lied'.
Common noun, singular; direct object of the verb.
Contracted preposition ('in' + definite article 'dem'); introduces a dative locative phrase.
Common noun; dative singular complement of 'im'; locative adjunct.

My parents love tea without sugar.
They love this song in the car.
